data.body:
"Wow, you're so chill about <work stuff>  why don't you get mad about it?"

If I'm sitting there at 7pm on the couch still stewing over some office bullshit, a) I'm not getting paid for that, and b) I'm only doing it to myself.

Leave that in the office/on Teams and walk away when your time is up.
